## Research Summary

### Entity Confirmed
**AGROCHINA PAKISTAN (PVT.) LIMITED** — NTN **4334750-9** confirmed in Pakistan Customs records. Registered address: Suite 23-B, Block P, Phase II, Johar Town, Lahore. Established January 2013. Website: agrochinapak.com (footer: *"Powered by Topsun Technologies"*).

---

### Key Findings

| Check | Status | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| **NTN 4334750-9** | ✅ CONFIRMED IN CUSTOMS | NTN 4334750 found in Pakistan Customs BoL (Oct 2018). ATL active/inactive status UNVERIFIED (CAPTCHA-gated portal) |
| **SECP Registration** | ⚠️ UNVERIFIED | Portal JS-gated; company is actively importing at scale ($3.03M, 2025–2026), consistent with registered status |
| **OFAC/UN/EU/UK Sanctions** | ✅ NO HITS | Entity, directors, group entities — all clean |
| **NAB** | ✅ NO HITS | No inquiries, investigations, or references found |
| **Courts** | ✅ NO HITS | No Lahore HC, Sindh HC, IHC, or SC cases found |
| **Adverse Media** | ✅ NONE | Dawn, Geo, The News, BR — no adverse coverage |
| **SBP Sanctions** | ✅ NO HITS | No watchlist references found |
| **Dark Web** | ⚠️ ERROR | Tor fetch failed; recommend gateway re-scan |

---

### Corporate Structure
**Topsun Group Pakistan** (est. 2012, Multan) is the parent group. AgroCHINA Pakistan is one of several operating entities:

- **Dr. Usman Ali** — CEO (also CEO of **Topsun Global FZE**, Hamriyah Free Zone, Sharjah, UAE)
- **M. Farooq Hasnain** — COO
- Other group entities: Topsun Chemicals Enterprises, SinoPak Chemicals, Sona Chemicals, KisanCare, Lotus Quality Seeds

---

### Trade Intelligence
- **$3.03M imports** | 76 shipments | Feb 2025–Jan 2026
- Sources: 🇨🇳 China 52% | 🇹🇼 Taiwan 27% | 🇰🇷 South Korea 15% | 🇴🇲 Oman 3% | 🇲🇾 Malaysia 3%
- Top HS codes: **27073000** (Xylene solvent, 42% of value), **29269050** (nitrile compounds, 12%)
- Historical confirmed: **Carbofuran 95% TC** (18,000 KG, 2018, Sinoway International Jiangsu); **Paraquat 20 SL** (34,350 KG, 2018)

---

### Risk: **3 – MONITOR**
Three moderate factors:
1. **HHP Pesticides**: Imports of WHO Class 1b Highly Hazardous Pesticide technical grades (carbofuran, paraquat) — legal in Pakistan but banned in EU/US; China banned carbofuran domestically June 2024
2. **Multi-entity opacity**: UAE FZE (Topsun Global FZE) + multiple Pakistani brands; UBO chain not portal-confirmed
3. **Registry gaps**: FBR ATL and SECP not directly verified (CAPTCHA portals); manual verification recommended
